arabic_text:
کرۃ الھوا
کرۃ النسیم
کرۃ النار
کرۃ المآء
کرۃ الأرض
سقرأ
جہنم
english_text:
Sphere of Air
Sphere of Breeze
Sphere of Fire
Sphere of Water
Sphere of Earth
Saqra
Jahannam (Hell)
alt_text: A cutaway cross-section of Earth showing nested concentric spheres (an onion structure). Arabic labels with arrows identify each layer from outermost to innermost: کرۃ الھوا (Sphere of Air), کرۃ النسیم (Sphere of Breeze), کرۃ النار (Sphere of Fire), کرۃ المآء (Sphere of Water), کرۃ الأرض (Sphere of Earth), and finally سقرأ (Saqra) deep inside. At the very center inside Saqra is a small yellow sphere labeled جہنم (Jahannam/Hell).
notes: Cosmological cross-section showing the seven nested spheres with Hell at the innermost core inside Saqra. Adds 'Sphere of Breeze' (کرۃ النسیم) between Air and Fire — a sub-layer not in the standard four-element scheme.
